metadata.title: Active Scope Gold Annotations
notes: This file defines teacher-defensible gold targets for the current active runtime scope only.
Approved targets are the best currently accepted subject, object, or phrase targets for student-facing questions.
Suppressed skills mark pesukim where the current active scope should skip rather than bluff.
